title: Fix black_band demos background thread exception on shutdown

comments.author: unknown
comments.text: Reproduced during manual acceptance: both demos/black_band_opaque.py and demos/black_band_transparent.py complete visual playback but print 'Exception in thread Thread-1 (_run_cycle)' traceback during shutdown after cycle wait/close. Likely race between cycle thread requests and pixoo.close().

comments.author: unknown
comments.text: Implemented fix by removing cycle-thread usage in black_band demos and using direct upload_sequence in frame_by_frame mode. Verified both demos now finish without thread traceback and without CommandList illegal-json errors. Also hardened demo_device_settings to restore rotation/mirror in finally.
